Bergen og Omland Friluftsråd – BOF

https://bof.no/
Avvik: 156 | Bestått: 207

Testregel 1.1.1b (1.1.1 - Nivå A)
CRITICAL

Linked image has empty alt and link has no other text

SERIOUS

SVG is missing accessible name

<svg class="" viewbox="0 0 24 24"><path d="M19 6.41l-1.41-1.41-5.59 5.59-5.59-5.59-1.41 1.41 5.59 5.59-5.59 5.59 1.41 1.41 5.59-5.59 5.59 5.59 1.41-1.41-5.59-5.59z"></path><path d="M0 0h24v24h-24z" fi
Add <title> element inside SVG, or aria-label attribute. Use role='presentation' if decorative
2.4.2 Sidetittel (1 avvik)
Testregel 2.4.2 (2.4.2 - Nivå AA)
SERIOUS

Page is missing h1 heading

<body class="home wp-singular page-template-default page page-id-213 wp-custom-logo wp-theme-astra theme-astra woocommerce-no-js ehf-header ehf-template-astra ehf-stylesheet-astra ast-desktop ast-page
Add a single h1 heading that describes the page content
1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (10 avvik)
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">BOF</h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h6

<h6 style="text-align: center;"><span style="color: rgba(0, 58, 91, 0.75);"><a href="https://www.vestkystparken.no/tur/vestkystparkelementer/022234" rel="noopener" style="color: rgba(0, 58, 91, 0.75);
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h6
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-large">Motta nyhetsbrev fra BOF</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Multiple nav elements exist but this one has no label

Data table has no caption or label

MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="cookielawinfo-column-1">Infokapsel</th>

MODERATE

Table header cell missing scope attribute

<th class="cookielawinfo-column-3">Varighet</th>

MODERATE

1.3.1 Informasjon og relasjoner (9 avvik)

MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-large">Motta nyhetsbrev fra BOF</h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE

MODERATE

First heading is h5, should start with h1

<h5 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default">BOF</h5>
Start your heading structure with h1
Testregel 1.3.1 (1.3.1 - Nivå A)
MODERATE

Heading level skipped: h2 to h4

<h4 class="elementor-heading-title elementor-size-default"><a href="https://frilager.no/frilager-bergen-og-omegn">Frilager</a></h4>
Don't skip heading levels. Use h3 instead of h4

MODERATE
